instructions.role: Senior UI UX Designer and Creative Frontend Engineer
instructions.project: Rebuilding mayanhvietnam.com e-commerce platform — camera and photography equipment store in Vietnam
instructions.goal: Design a premium, high-end web interface with absolute data accuracy. Express full creative freedom in modern layouts and luxury transition animations. The site must convert visitors into buyers of high-value camera gear (20M-150M VND range) with an immersive, cinematic feel.

darkMode.description: Premium cinematic black base with cyber neon orange highlights and glowing accents

lightMode.description: Warm soft cream base with a deep rich orange accent

realProductData.description: Use this exact real product data scraped from mayanhvietnam.com. Do not invent product names, prices, or specs.
realProductData.priceFormat: X,XXX,XXXđ (Vietnamese Dong). For items without listed price use 'Vui lòng gọi'.

sampleProducts.name: Máy ảnh Canon EOS R50 Black kèm Lens RF-S 18-45mm Chính Hãng

specs.autofocus: Dual Pixel CMOS AF II, 4,503 điểm

promotions: Dán màn hình free trọn đời máy ảnh

sampleProducts.name: Máy ảnh Sony Alpha A7R VI
FLYCAM DJI Mavic 3 Pro (Pro Combo | DJI RC Pro)

storeLocations.address: 09 Nam Quốc Cang, P. Bến Thành
Số 58 Nguyễn Hiền, KDC 91B, P. Tân An
Số 1 Đường số 1, Tây sông Hậu, P. Long Xuyên
126 Hoàng Sa, KP 4, P. Thới Sơn

usedProducts.flashAndStudioLights: 30 ngày (không bảo hành bóng, phím, chân đèn)

exchangePolicy.newDifferentProduct: 3 ngày (còn nguyên nhãn mác, chưa sử dụng)

requiredComponents: Navigation Header with intelligent Search and Category Megamenu showing all 9 categories with thumbnails
Hero Banner Slider with 5 real banners from mayanhvietnam.com (Tết banners, promotional banners)
Category Grid with icon thumbnails for all 9 categories
Product Grid and Product Card showing real prices, discount badges, stock status, and wishlist triggers
Lens Compatibility Checker: test if lenses fit specific camera bodies by mount type (RF, Z, FE, EF, etc.)
Condition Variant Selector: handle multi-condition products (MỚI 100%, Like new, Đẹp) with per-condition pricing
Trade-in Widget: submit requests to sell old gear
Studio Setup Wizard: custom studio room layout suggestions
Footer with localized store addresses, contact info, warranty policy summary, and payment icons

creativeFreedom.layoutPhilosophy: Modern, clean, visual-first, and content-rich. Design unique bold layouts such as asymmetrical grids, floating menus, or horizontal scroll sections. Prioritize product photography. The camera/flycam gear should feel premium and immersive — this is not generic e-commerce.
luxuryMotion: Staggered fade-ins and clip-mask banner reveals on page load
Premium hover effects: subtle card lift, text slide-ups, and glowing orange borders
Apple-style scroll storytelling showcasing camera mechanics, sensors, and lens elements
Ken Burns zoom effects for sliders and backdrop-blur transitions for overlays and cart drawer
Smooth button state transitions with clean loading animations
Dynamic mechanic snapping animation when testing compatible lenses in the Lens Checker widget
creativeFreedom.noPlaceholderImages: All images must use real CDN URLs from mayanhvietnam.com or realistic placeholder descriptions. Never use generic placeholder images.

outputRequirement: Deliver clean, fully responsive Next.js and Tailwind CSS code. Every product, price, spec, and image must come from the real data above. Do not fabricate product names, prices, or technical specifications.
